modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble entering flexible hours on timesheet for hourly employees

full_description_text: 
So, the user is trying to figure out how to log their time on the timesheet since they have a flexible schedule. They're not sure how to calculate the flexible hours they need to enter. It seems like they need some guidance on this whole process.
short_description: Trouble entering flexible hours on timesheet for hourly employees
description: So, the user is trying to figure out how to log their time on the timesheet since they have a flexible schedule. They're not sure how to calculate the flexible hours they need to enter. It seems like they need some guidance on this whole process.
